title: 20 Pack Mini Wood Table Number Holders - 25Pcs Kraft Paper Place Cards - Name Card Holders for Tables (Black)
features: Quantity: Set of 20 mini table card holders, ensuring you have plenty for your event or establishment.
Package Addition: Includes 25 kraft paper place cards, providing a complete solution for your labeling needs.
Material: Made of real hardwood with a modern look. The sturdy construction ensures durability for repeated use.
Usages: Ideal for holding table numbers, names, food name tags, and other information, adding a professional touch to any table settings.
Suitable for: Events, weddings, parties, buffets, cafes, and restaurants, making them a versatile choice for various settings.
